desc: Six cardinal directions resolved against the active view's basis.
summary: Six cardinal directions resolved against the active view's basis.
usecase: Arrow-key style nudge moves that respect view orientation.
postcondition: Each element translated by (step × basis). Audit entry written.
logictree: 1) Resolve direction enum + step mm + element ids. 2) Pick basis from ActiveView. 3) Convert step mm → ft. 4) Transaction: MoveElement per id. 5) Commit, log. 6) Failure → WireFault + rollback.
